name: Super Market
description: A modern online supermarket platform for daily essentials shopping.
big_description: Super Market is a full-featured online grocery platform where users can browse daily essentials, filter products by category, search items easily, and add them to cart. It offers a smooth checkout system and responsive design for better user experience.

name: Big Commerce
description: A scalable e-commerce application with advanced features.
big_description: Big Commerce is a powerful e-commerce web application built for scalability and performance. It includes product management, secure authentication, shopping cart system, and payment integration with a clean and intuitive user interface.

name: Food Village
description: A food ordering platform with real-time features.
big_description: Food Village is an interactive food ordering web app where users can explore various cuisines, view menus, and order meals. It includes real-time order tracking, responsive UI, and smooth navigation for an enhanced user experience.
